retry_reason: Failure is due to memory allocation or option insertion errors, which are not transient from a refcount perspective.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to set/update CALIPSO hop-by-hop options on a request socket, involving option insertion and replacement. The refcount operations (txopt_put) are incidental internal management, not the function's main objective.
